semantic_meaning: Captures the last time a contact actively engaged with sales-oriented touchpoints such as your website, forms, documents, meetings links, or tracked emails. Unlike notes_last_contacted, this excludes marketing emails and bulk outreach, making it a purer signal of individual sales interest.
auto_population_source: Set automatically by HubSpot when a contact engages with your site, submits a form, interacts with a document, clicks a meetings link, or opens/clicks a tracked email. Excludes marketing emails and emails sent to multiple contacts.
common_uses: Lead scoring: weight contacts higher when they've recently engaged with sales content
Sales prioritization: sort leads by most recent engagement to focus on hot prospects
Re-engagement triggers: alert sales reps when a dormant contact re-engages
Pipeline hygiene: identify deals where the contact has gone silent

alternatives_to_consider.when_appropriate: When you want the last time someone from your team reached out (outbound), not when the contact engaged (inbound)
Date-only version of this field, used in some reporting contexts
When you specifically need meeting-tool activity rather than all sales engagement types
